_note: Table column indices + category code patterns for the Arredo3 line-item table, mirroring logi-v1-main/quotation-extractor/lib/pdf-config.ts. 'weight' is optional (Arredo3 has no per-item weight column) — omit it and the weight-estimator falls back to density. categoryPatterns are tested in order against the product code; first match wins, else defaultCategory.
